title: The real cost of an AI thought
excerpt: Every prompt has a power bill. Here's how to think about the energy behind inference — and why it changes how we design facilities.

title: Heat is not waste
excerpt: The biggest by-product of a data centre is warmth. Treating it as a resource instead of a problem is the most underrated move in sustainable compute.

title: Buildings that think
excerpt: Edge compute and intelligent building systems are quietly merging. The facilities we commission today will increasingly run themselves.
